# gicons — brand icons for every framework

Install: npm install @gicons/react (or pnpm add / yarn add / bun add)
Replace "react" with: vue, svelte, angular, web, svg

## Naming
{Brand}{Type}{Variant} in PascalCase
stripe/wordmark-blurple.svg → StripeWordmarkBlurple

## Usage
```
import { StripeWordmarkBlurple } from '@gicons/react';
<StripeWordmarkBlurple size={32} />
```

## Props
size (default 24), width, height. React: all SVG props + forwardRef.

## Available icons
| Brand | Components |
| Stripe | StripeWordmarkBlurple, StripeWordmarkSlate, StripeWordmarkWhite |

## API
GET /api/icons → JSON with all brands, component names, install commands
GET /llms-full.txt → full docs with all framework examples

## Packages
@gicons/react — React 18+
@gicons/vue — Vue 3.3+
@gicons/svelte — Svelte 4+
@gicons/angular — Angular 17+
@gicons/web — Web Components
@gicons/svg — raw optimized SVGs

Source: https://github.com/gicons/gicons
License: MIT (code), trademarks (brand logos)
